input.hiring_signal_brief: DataDog clone startup Logpulse posted 2 ML engineer roles 5 days ago. Founder tweet 3 days ago: building anomaly detection in-house, tired of paying $40k/yr SaaS tax.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted ML engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Current bench: 4 ML engineers available.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: Must avoid all corporate filler phrases. Seed-stage founders respond to direct language.
dimensions.check_value: synergy|touch base|scalable solution|best-in-class|reach out|circle back|leverage|cutting-edge|innovative solution|world-class|hope this finds you well|robust|just following up|circling back|synergize|ecosystem|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference the specific founder signal: anomaly detection or $40k SaaS pain.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Output must include a booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge checks tone matches founder-to-founder direct style. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
